suppress.notes: file name: express:5.2.1 CVE-2024-10491: res.links() header injection - not exploitable as res.links() is not used in this project.
file name: hono:=4.12.10 CVE-2026-39408: hono has been upgraded to 4.12.14 which fixes this vulnerability. False positive due to NVD/OSS Index matching on the old version string.
